## Summary

Brief description of what this PR does.

## Type of change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (broken code, typo, broken link)
- [ ] 📝 New lab (lab-NNN)
- [ ] ✏️ Lab improvement (existing lab)
- [ ] 🌐 Translation
- [ ] 🏗️ Infrastructure (devcontainer, mkdocs config, CI)
- [ ] 📦 Data / assets

## Lab(s) affected

List the lab numbers and titles changed/added.

## Checklist

- [ ] I tested all code samples and they work
- [ ] `cd docs && python -m mkdocs build --strict` passes with no warnings
- [ ] No API keys or secrets are hardcoded (use `os.environ["GITHUB_TOKEN"]`)
- [ ] New labs follow the [lab template](../CONTRIBUTING.md#lab-template)
- [ ] I've linked to related labs in the "Next Steps" section

## Screenshots (optional)

If relevant, add screenshots of the running lab output.
